OR{0}(3)
  FLIP{121}(1, 3), MIRROR{137}(1 ← 893248539, 0)
   ⤷ ROTATE{118}(0, 2)

  TRANSLATE{count(193)}(0, 0 ← 521576064), TRANSLATE{count(193)}(2, 0), TRANSLATE{count(196)}(0, 1)
